## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps as the engagement approaches its end date.](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Contract end date is May 11th; \~3 weeks remaining to wrap up deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Content performance is strong despite recent site migration and core update (84% traffic increase)](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Some GA4 tracking anomalies noted post-migration; likely due to redirects and re-indexing](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Glossary content needs migration to new CMS (Craft); Aida to provide 25 additional terms](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Deliverables

  - [46 assignments in Airtable ready for approval](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Aiming for 6-7 articles/week (2000-2500 words each) to meet 50,000-word contract](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [Colin to review and prioritize assignments, leaving comments for urgent pieces](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Statistics articles prioritized for backlink potential](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Website Performance

  - [Traffic up 84% in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Top performing blogs: Meta ads formats, LLMs for marketing, AI prompts for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Niche topics (e.g., insurance marketing) showing lower but notable traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### Analytics and Tracking Issues

  - [Post-migration: '/blog' subfolder replacing '/blogs', causing tracking discrepancies](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Large number of "not set" landing pages in GA4 (1,600 sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Unexpected spike in homepage traffic (19,000 sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Likely due to re-indexing and redirect attribution in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### CMS Migration and Content Management

  - [New Craft CMS workflow explained](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Modular content blocks for easy formatting](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Two-step publishing process: Enable content, then "Publish Site"](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Glossary Content

  - [Previously published terms in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Some terms already generating traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Aida to provide 25 additional glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Colin to review and approve content assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Aida to compile and deliver 25 new glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Web agency to migrate existing glossary content to new CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring analytics for post-migration normalization](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Maintain content production pace of 6-7 articles per week until May 11th](https://fathom.video/share/ZDA9hs1WEwJs6Jckwdxhz-oMKRk_u2Vq?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
